The '''Karpaki Fifty''' was a [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] [[Sniper rifle/Legends|sniper rifle]]. Several modified Karpaki Fifties were used by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. One was used by [[Ben Skywalker]] to [[Mission to Vulpter|assassinate]] [[Dur Gejjen]].

Complete with a folding [[Stock/Legends|stock]], it was small enough that it could just barely be hidden under a [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] when folded. It had moderate recoil, and was equipped with smart [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] optics that automatically adjusted the rifle's [[Scope/Legends|scope]] depending on windage, distance, and the movement of a target.
